title: Browse menu by category and add a customized item to the cart
description: Verifies a customer can filter the menu by category, customize a product (size and toppings), add it to the cart, and see it in the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Select a category filter
Open a product detail view from the product grid
Select a size variant
Select an optional topping or modifier
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart link to view the cart
Verify the cart displays at least one item
Verify the cart item displays selected customization details

title: Initiate payment and show a payment interface
description: Verifies the checkout page initiates payment creation and displays a Midtrans payment widget or QR interface for the user to proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Select a menu category
Open a product details modal
Select a valid size option
Select at least one topping option
Add the product to the cart
Navigate to /checkout
Verify a payment interface is displayed (payment widget or QR)

title: Start an ordering session from the welcome screen
description: Verifies a customer can begin an ordering session from the welcome screen and is taken to the menu page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start an ordering session
Verify the user lands on the menu page

title: Proceed from cart to checkout with a valid customer name
description: Verifies a customer can adjust cart contents, enter a valid customer name, and proceed to the checkout page.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product detail view from the product grid
Select a size variant
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart link to view the cart
Increase the quantity of the cart item by 1
Fill "Alya" into the customer name field
Proceed to checkout
Verify the user lands on the checkout page

title: Access checkout from the main kiosk funnel
description: Verifies a customer can follow the kiosk flow from welcome to menu to cart and reach checkout after providing required information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary action to start ordering
Select a menu category
Open a product details modal
Select a valid size option
Add the product to the cart
Navigate to /cart
Fill a valid customer name into the customer name field
Proceed to checkout from the cart
Verify the user lands on the checkout page

title: Recover from cart customer-name validation and proceed to checkout
description: Verifies the user is blocked from checkout with an invalid customer name and can correct it to proceed to checkout successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product details modal
Select a valid size option
Add the product to the cart
Navigate to /cart
Fill 1 character into the customer name field
Attempt to proceed to checkout
Fill a valid customer name into the customer name field
Attempt to proceed to checkout
Verify the user lands on the checkout page

title: Show customer name validation error and recover to proceed to checkout
description: Verifies a customer is blocked from checkout with an empty or too-short name, then can correct it and proceed to checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product detail view from the product grid
Select a size variant
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart link to view the cart
Fill "A" into the customer name field
Proceed to checkout
Fill "Alya" into the customer name field
Proceed to checkout
Verify a customer name validation error is visible
Verify the user lands on the checkout page

title: Update an order from pending to preparing
description: Verifies a barista can start preparing an order and the UI reflects the order moving into the preparing state.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for pending orders to be visible
Open the first pending order
Trigger the action to start preparing the order
Verify the order appears in the preparing queue

title: Admin logs in and reaches operational dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can authenticate from the admin entry page and is shown the sales overview and sync controls after successful login.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the credentials
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed with sales overview content
Verify sync controls are visible

title: Update an order from preparing to ready
description: Verifies a barista can mark an in-progress order as ready and the UI reflects the order moving into the ready state.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for preparing orders to be visible
Open the first preparing order
Trigger the action to mark the order as ready
Verify the order appears in the ready state on the kitchen dashboard

title: Show order confirmation with queue number after successful payment navigation
description: Verifies the success page shows an order confirmation view including a queue number when the user reaches it.

steps.description: Navigate to /success
Verify an order confirmation is displayed
Verify a queue number is displayed

title: KDS shows incoming orders separated by lifecycle state
description: Verifies the kitchen display shows queues/sections for pending and preparing orders for barista operation.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for the kitchen dashboard to finish initial loading
Verify the kitchen dashboard displays order queues for pending and preparing

title: View orders grouped by status on the public board
description: Verifies the status board displays the grouped sections for pending, preparing, and ready orders.

steps.description: Navigate to /status
Verify the status board shows grouped sections for pending, preparing, and ready orders

title: Remove an item from the cart
description: Verifies a customer can remove an item from the cart and the cart updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product detail view from the product grid
Select a size variant
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart link to view the cart
Remove the item from the cart
Verify the cart shows an empty state or no items are listed

title: Manual retry displays payment interface after widget load failure
description: Verifies the user can use the manual retry control on checkout and the payment interface becomes visible after retry.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product details modal
Select a valid size option
Add the product to the cart
Navigate to /checkout
Wait for the checkout page payment loading state to settle
Click the manual retry control for the payment widget
Verify a payment interface is displayed (payment widget or QR)

title: Open and dismiss product details without adding to cart
description: Verifies a customer can open a product detail view to review options and close it without adding an item to the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product detail view from the product grid
Close the product detail view
Verify the menu product grid is displayed
Verify no cart item count indicator increases

title: Trigger manual POS sync and see syncing indicator
description: Verifies a barista can trigger a manual sync and the UI shows a syncing in-progress state during the sync.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Click the manual sync control
Verify a syncing indicator is visible

title: Prevent proceeding to checkout with empty customer name
description: Verifies the cart blocks checkout when the customer name is empty and shows a validation error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product details modal
Select a valid size option
Add the product to the cart
Navigate to /cart
Clear the customer name field
Attempt to proceed to checkout
Verify a customer name validation error is visible

title: Status board handles an empty queue state
description: Verifies the status board shows an empty state when there are no orders to display.

steps.description: Navigate to /status
Wait for the status board to finish initial loading
Verify either orders are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Admin is blocked with invalid credentials
description: Verifies entering incorrect admin credentials prevents access and shows an authentication error without revealing the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Fill invalid-admin@example.com into the username field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the credentials
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the admin dashboard content is not displayed
